title: Charles V becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: Charles V was Holy Roman Emperor and Archduke of Austria from 1519 to 1556, King of Spain from 1516 to 1556, King of Sicily and Naples from 1516 to 1554, and also Lord of the Netherlands and titular Duke of Burgundy from 1506 to 1555.

title: Charles II of Spain becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: Charles II was the king of Spain from 1665 to 1700.

title: Philip II of Spain becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: Philip II, sometimes known in Spain as Philip the Prudent, was King of Spain from 1556, King of Portugal from 1580, and King of Naples and Sicily from 1554 until his death in 1598.

title: Isabella I of Castile becomes Queen of Castile and Leon
fact: Isabella I was Queen of Castile and León from 1474 until her death in 1504.

title: Philip V of Spain becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: Philip V was king of Spain from 1 November 1700 to 14 January 1724 and again from 6 September 1724 to his death in 1746.

title: Juana I of Castile becomes Queen of Castile and Leon
fact: Joanna was queen of Castile from 1504 and queen of Aragon from 1516 to her death in 1555.

title: Philip IV of Spain becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: Philip IV, also called the Planet King, was King of Spain from 1621 to his death and King of Portugal from 1621 to 1640.

title: Philip III of Spain becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: Philip III was King of Spain and Portugal during the period known as the Iberian Union, reigning from 1598 until his death in 1621.

title: Peter of Castile becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: Peter, called Peter the Cruel or the Just, was King of Castile and León from 1350 to 1369.

title: Ferdinand III of Castille becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: Ferdinand III, called the Saint, was King of Castile from 1217 and King of León from 1230 as well as King of Galicia from 1231.

title: Henry II of Castile becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: Henry II, called Henry of Trastámara or the Fratricidal, was the first King of Castile and León from the House of Trastámara.

title: Alfonso X of Castile and Leon becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: Alfonso X was King of Castile, León and Galicia from 1 June 1252 until his death in 1284.

title: Henry IV of Castile becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: Henry IV of Castile, nicknamed the Impotent, was King of Castile and León and the last of the weak late-medieval kings of Castile and León.

title: Alfonso XI of Castile and Leon becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: Alfonso XI, called the Avenger, was King of Castile and León.

title: John II of Castile becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: John II of Castile was King of Castile and León from 1406 to 1454.

title: John I of Castile and Leon becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: John I was King of Castile and León from 1379 until 1390.

title: Enrique III of Castile becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: Henry III of Castile, called the Suffering due to his ill health, was the son of John I and Eleanor of Aragon.

title: Sancho IV of León and Castile becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: Sancho IV of Castile called the Brave, was the king of Castile, León and Galicia from 1284 to his death.

title: Ferdinand IV of Castile becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: Ferdinand IV of Castile called the Summoned, was King of Castile and León from 1295 until his death.

title: Alfonso becomes King of Castile and Leon
fact: Alfonso, Prince of Asturias, called Alfonso the Innocent, was the figurehead of rebelling Castilian magnates against his half-brother Henry IV, who had recognized him as heir presumptive.
